tags.name: Deanfoot Road
tags.note: Sharp corner at intersection with Main Street. Long vehicles must access/exit Deanfoot Road via School Brae instead, as they cannot negotiate the sharp corner and WILL get stuck trying to navigate through, resulting in gridlock on Main Street.
